compounds.frequency: on break at time of report

benefits.description: Intended to use BPC-157 for deep sleep based on community reports; no confirmed benefit noted due to adverse experience

side_effects.description: Vertigo spinning episodes lasting approximately ten seconds each, occurring every 30-60 minutes for approximately six hours
Nystagmus (side-to-side eye spasms) accompanying vertigo episodes; unable to drive next morning due to symptom severity
Some nausea noted; OP attributed it possibly to heavy dinner
Felt tired and head felt fuzzy/eye muscles tired the following morning
Could not sleep normally due to recurring vertigo episodes throughout the night

protocol_notes: First-time BPC-157 use. Intended dose was 250mcg but miscalculated reconstitution (added ~2.25mL bacteriostatic water to 5mg vial instead of proper ratio), resulting in estimated 500-625mcg dose. Took testosterone (5mg, female HRT) the night prior. Was also recently on tirzepatide but on a break. Planned to restart BPC-157 at lower dose after a few days.
